data.title: Credicorp Ltd. initiates quiet period for 3Q25 earnings release from Oct 30 to Nov 13 to prevent leaks of results.
data.description: In Lima, Peru, on October 17th, 2025, Credicorp Ltd. (NYSE: BAP | BVL: BAP) has declared the initiation of a quiet period for the impending release of its 3rd quarter 2025 financial results. This period will extend from October 30th to November 13th, during which the company will abstain from revealing any financial data, discussing financial performance, or addressing inquiries related to the results. This measure is being implemented in adherence to Credicorp's corporate disclosure policies aimed at preventing premature dissemination of financial information and maintaining equitable practices.

data.title: XLM tests $0.30 support as Bitcoin crash leads to $1B liquidations. Stellar at $0.31 despite positive news on Protocol 23 upgrade and $460M Archax partnership.
data.description: Following Bitcoin's drop below $105,000, Stellar is currently trading at $0.31. This decline in the market has led to widespread selling. However, positive news, such as the Protocol 23 upgrade and the $460 million partnership with Archax, has been overshadowed by the recent market turbulence.
S&P: Expect deficits for France to remain elevated over the next three years.
US bank deposits fell to $18.436 tln from $18.523 tln in prior week.

data.title: Third Coast Bancshares, Inc. wins SCI Transaction of the Year for a synthetic risk transfer deal with EJF Capital. HOUSTON, Oct. 17, 2025.
data.description: Third Coast Bancshares, Inc. was recently awarded for its innovative synthetic risk transfer deal conducted in collaboration with EJF Capital. The award honors their achievement in the financial sector. The Company, traded on NYSE and NYSE Texas under ticker symbol TCBX, received this prestigious recognition on October 17th, 2025 in Houston. This recognition highlights the success of their partnership and the impact of their innovative approach in managing risk.

data.title: Fubo grants stock units to 12 new employees totaling 74,320 shares under NYSE Rule. Vests over 4 years.
data.description: FuboTV Inc., known as Fubo and listed on the NYSE as FUBO, revealed that on October 16, 2025, the Compensation Committee of Fubo granted restricted stock unit awards encompassing a total of 74,320 shares of its common stock to attract 12 new employees to join the company. These awards were provided under Fubo’s 2025 Employment Inducement Equity Incentive Plan and will vest annually over the course of four years following the grant date.

data.title: Starwood Property Trust to release Q3 2025 results on Nov 10 before NYSE opening; conference call to follow.
data.description: In Miami Beach, Florida on October 17, 2025, Starwood Property Trust (NYSE: STWD) revealed plans to unveil its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on November 10, 2025, prior to the commencement of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The company will conduct a conference call following the release.

data.title: Bank of America announces preferred stock dividends payable in November and December 2025. Board authorizes cash dividends on outstanding shares.
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina - Bank of America Corporation disclosed on October 17, 2025, that its Board of Directors approved regular cash dividends for outstanding shares or depositary shares of specific series of preferred stock. The dividends per share for the preferred stock series were also specified.
S&P: Greece affirmed at 'bbb/a-2', outlook stable.

data.title: Value Line, Inc. (NASDAQ: VALU) declares $0.325 quarterly cash dividend per share, on 9,405,828 outstanding shares.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, Value Line, Inc. (NASDAQ: VALU) revealed its Board of Directors' decision to approve a quarterly cash dividend of $0.325 per common share. This dividend will be paid out on November 10, 2025, to shareholders listed on the records as of October 27, 2025. The total count of common stock outstanding for the company stands at 9,405,828 shares as of the same date.

data.title: TRX at $0.31 tests lower Bollinger Band support following Bitcoin's dip, down 2.4% in 24 hours. Altcoins see sell-off amid 7.29% BTC decline.
data.description: The cryptocurrency TRON (TRX) is currently priced at $0.31, marking a 2.4% decrease in the past 24 hours. This decline has led TRON to test crucial support levels, a trend attributed to Bitcoin's 7.29% drop impacting altcoin markets.
S&P: France ratings lowered on heightened risks to budgetary consolidation.
S&P downgrades France to 'a+/a-1' from ‘aa-/a-1+'; outlook stble.
S&P: Expect France's gross general government debt to reach 121% of GDP in 2028.

data.title: Markets react positively to trade easing and bank earnings surge. Powell hints at rate cut. Big banks excel, but smaller lenders show cracks.
data.description: Following the surprising announcement on Friday, Oct. 10, of 100% tariffs on Chinese goods by Donald Trump, the president quickly changed his stance, ensuring that trade relations "will be fine." This reassurance was well-received by markets, leading to a swift recovery on Wall Street at the beginning of the week. The recovery was further supported by strong bank earnings surpassing expectations and dovish comments from Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. Powell's concerns about increasing risks to employment hinted at the central bank's inclination towards further lowering borrowing costs, strengthening expectations for a rate cut later in the month. While major U.S. banks like JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM), Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (NYSE: GS), Bank of America Corp. (NYSE: BAC), Citigroup Inc. (NYSE: C), and Wells Fargo & Co. (NYSE: WFC) performed well, cracks in smaller lenders began to emerge.

data.title: Huntington Bancshares declares $0.155 quarterly cash dividend on common stock (Nasdaq: HBAN). Board of Directors announcement.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on October 17, 2025, Huntington Bancshares Incorporated shared news that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.155 per common share for the company's stock (Nasdaq: HBAN). This amount remains consistent with the previous quarter's dividend payout.

data.title: Chord Energy to announce Q3 2025 results on Nov 4 after market close. Live webcast and call will follow.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, Chord Energy Corp. (Nasdaq: CHRD) disclosed its intention to reveal the financial and operating outcomes for the third quarter of 2025 on November 4, 2025, post-market closing. The Company is set to conduct a live webcast and conference call following the release.
